form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (30.28) over 515m at Gosford. Draws the cherry this time. Deserves respect.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start shifted outwards and checked off heels.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at this track (30.03) in a Grade 4/5, finishing a 6 length fourth. Goes well out of this box with a win and two minors. Looks suited here and can measure up on best.

form.formComment: Nearing another win after her success on January 24 at this track over 520m. Last start was fourth over 520m in 30.02, behind Foreign Capital. Solid formlines coming through that last run. Looks a major player.

form.formComment: Eye-catching performance to score by 3.5 lengths in a Grade 5 last start at this track, recording a convincing 29.70 over the 520m journey. In form and rates on top again.

form.formComment: Was among the placegetters latest at this track when a one length second but did clock a brilliant 29.63 for the 520m trip. Warrants respect.
